---
title: ""
---

# 🐄 TriAnn Integrated Farm

### Quality Livestock & Crop Production

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Welcome to **TriAnn Integrated Farm**

We specialize in:

-   Dairy [Cattle](cattle.qmd)
-   Pig Farming
-   Duck Farming
-   Banana Plantation

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Our Products

-   Heifers for Sale
-   Pigs
-   Ducks
-   Bananas

------------------------------------------------------------------------

👉 Visit our product pages to see available stock
